html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events

GenericBurntKit

The Jubilantern Post Kit is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Year of the Depths Worm. It is found in the Offerings Filter, requires 6 Lucky Gold Nugget to craft, and a Depths Worm Shrine to prototype. The Jubilantern Post Kit can be deployed to build a Jubilantern Post. Building another Jubilantern Post within 2 Tile radius can make them connect together.

Once placed, the Jubilantern Post has a Light Bulb inside its 1 slot inventory, but it will spoil after 24 days. The player can place anything that can be put inside Mushroom Lights to make it glow, including Light Bulbs, Glow Berries, Lesser Glow Berries, Mushroom Spores, Festive Lights, Crustashines or Enlightened Shards. It will not change colors according to items inside. The Jubilantern Post also acts like an Ice Box and slow down the spoilage of the items put inside by 75%, extending the spoilage time by four times.

The Jubilantern Post and its connecting lights can light up 1.25 Tile radius.

Gallery

  • Jubilantern Post Lights when connecting each other

GenericBurntKit
“It's post to be there.”
–Wilson
“It'll be brighter if I burn it.”
–Willow
“Post is both dazzling and useful, like Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“It does seem to bring some cheer.”
–Wendy
“LIGHTING SYSTEM SUPPORT”
–WX-78
“Delightful!”
–Wickerbottom
“No, Lucy. You are not chopping it down.”
–Woodie
“Nice post.”
–Maxwell
“I höpe she'll höld.”
–Wigfrid
“Fancy!”
–Webber
“It sets a festive mood!”
–Warly
“Pretty tall friend”
–Wormwood
“Not bad.”
–Winona
“A post with the most to boast!”
–Wortox
“Party post? Party post!”
–Wurt
“It makes me happy too, Woby!”
–Walter
“Who has time to celebrate? Okay, fine.”
–Wanda
“It's post post”
–Wilson
“At least it burned bright!”
–Willow
“It was good post.”
–Wolfgang
“Shame, it was pretty.”
–Wendy
“DELETED”
–WX-78
“Carbonized. Pity.”
–Wickerbottom
“There’s nothing left to chop, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“What a waste.”
–Maxwell
“Must the göds taketh everything?”
–Wigfrid
“Aw. It burned.”
–Webber
“Hey! I was using that!”
–Warly
“Poor tall friend”
–Wormwood
“That’s not how it works.”
–Winona
“Who cares! We have spares! Right?”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, party over.”
–Wurt
“Went up like a giant matchstick!”
–Walter
“Who saw that coming? Me.”
–Wanda
“Where's it post to go?”
–Wilson
“I can burn it as is.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang light up the dance floor.”
–Wolfgang
“Shall I cast some light upon the darkness?”
–Wendy
“ASSEMBLY REQUIRED”
–WX-78
“One of those whippersnappers should find themselves useful and construct this.”
–Wickerbottom
“These would look great around my cabin.”
–Woodie
“I have to do everything!”
–Maxwell
“Prepare thyself, för revelry döth await.”
–Wigfrid
“We can build it!”
–Webber
“It will look lovely in the evening.”
–Warly
“Make tall friend!”
–Wormwood
“Party lights? Hmm...”
–Winona
“It will stand tall with them all!”
–Wortox
“Me good builder.”
–Wurt
“Light it up, post to post!”
–Walter
“Let's put it up already!”
–Wanda
The Jubilantern Post Kit is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Year of the Depths Worm. It is found in the Offerings Filter, requires 6 Lucky Gold Nugget to craft, and a Depths Worm Shrine to prototype. The Jubilantern Post Kit can be deployed to build a Jubilantern Post. Building another Jubilantern Post within 2 Tile radius can make them connect together.
Once placed, the Jubilantern Post has a Light Bulb inside its 1 slot inventory, but it will spoil after 24 days. The player can place anything that can be put inside Mushroom Lights to make it glow, including Light Bulbs, Glow Berries, Lesser Glow Berries, Mushroom Spores, Festive Lights, Crustashines or Enlightened Shards. It will not change colors according to items inside. summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Jubilantern Post Kit là một vật phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Year of the Depths Worm. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Lễ vật, cần 6 Thỏi Vàng May mắn để chế tạo và một Đền Giun Sâu để nguyên mẫu. Bộ công cụ đăng bài Jubilantern có thể được triển khai để xây dựng Bài viết Jubilantern. Xây dựng một Jubilantern Post khác trong bán kính 2 ô có thể khiến chúng kết nối với nhau.

The '''Jubilantern Post Kit''' is a craftable item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', and introduced in ''[[Year of the Depths Worm]]''. It is found in the [[Offerings Filter]], requires 6 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] to craft, and a [[Depths Worm Shrine]] to prototype. The Jubilantern Post Kit can be deployed to build a '''Jubilantern Post'''. Building another Jubilantern Post within 2 [[Tile]] radius can make them connect together. 

Once placed, the Jubilantern Post has a [[Light Bulb]] inside its 1 slot inventory, but it will spoil after 24 days. The player can place anything that can be put inside [[Mushroom Lights]] to make it glow, including Light Bulbs, [[Glow Berry|Glow Berries]], [[Lesser Glow Berry|Lesser Glow Berries]], [[Mushroom Spore]]s, [[Festive Lights]], [[Crustashine]]s or [[Enlightened Shard]]s. It will not change colors according to items inside. The Jubilantern Post also acts like an [[Ice Box]] and slow down the spoilage of the items put inside by 75%, extending the spoilage time by four times.

The Jubilantern Post and its connecting lights can light up 1.25 Tile radius.
